subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-24 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: He observed that every being possessed one reality, with the exception of humans, who have both a natural reality and a spiritual one
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر کائنی یک حقیقت دارد مگر انسان که هم حقیقت طبیعی دارد و هم حقیقت روحانی از بسط
subcodes.subjects: @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @human reality created in the image of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
